hooks.command: bash -c 'NEW=$(find "/c/Users/jsmcl/OneDrive/Documents/Claude/Projects/MakinMoves/outbox" -name "*.md" -newer "/c/Users/jsmcl/OneDrive/Documents/Claude/Projects/MakinMoves/logs/.last_check" 2>/dev/null | head -5); if [ -n "$NEW" ]; then echo "[COORDINATOR MESSAGE] New instructions in outbox: $NEW — read them before continuing."; fi; touch "/c/Users/jsmcl/OneDrive/Documents/Claude/Projects/MakinMoves/logs/.last_check"'
